author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — requires unrestricted access to src/subagent.rs (FORBIDDEN under current cleanup scope).

**Fix outline:** Decompose run_subagent (src/subagent.rs:657-968, 311 lines) into 7 focused helpers: (1) bootstrap_transcript (resume vs fresh), (2) prepare_worktree_and_prompt, (3) filter_tool_definitions, (4) resolve_model_and_provider, (5) build_permission_manager, (6) run_agent_turn_loop (which itself should delegate one iteration to a helper), (7) finalize_subagent (transcript storage + worktree cleanup). Replace the five duplicated SubagentResult error literals with a fail(agent_id, msg) -> SubagentResult constructor. Removes the clippy::too_many_lines allow and brings cyclomatic complexity under V(G)=15.

**Blocking:** src/subagent.rs is reserved scope. Defer to a future unrestricted pass — likely combined with #401.
